text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Curren Chan's plan is to get her
UmaTube channel up and running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition to this and her already very active
Umastagram, she also plans on posting
extensively on Umatok and Umatter from here on
out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I help her take pictures and videos for her
socials, I realize just how difficult of a task it all
is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain my concerns for her fatigue levels, but...
she brushes them aside and continues working
hard to spread her cuteness.
